title: Slimes and Slimebooks
description: A Splendid Slimes addon with Iron's Spells compatibility
body:
This **Splendid Slimes** addon adds two new slimes inspired in **Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks**, the Ink Slime and the Runic Slime!

# Ink Slime:
**Diet:** Loves to eat Arcane Essence, but also likes Arcane Debris, Cinder Essence, and any item that's used to select spell elements (Blood Bottle, Poison Potato, Lightning Bottle, that kind of stuff)

**Behavior:**
- Hates all Iron's Spells' mages and will start attacking them with Magic Missile when near them
- Will sometimes start levitating because of the wild energy inside them
- When they see food, they will teleport straight to it if they're hungry

**Plorts:** Their Plort can turn into any type of arcane ink, with the rarity varying with the ink's power

How to get: You can get Ink Slime Hearts by three different ways:
- The heart can be found in chests around all Iron's Spells' dungeons
- You can make them by pressing 64x of their plorts in the Slime Press
- You can also make them by pressing a Rare Ink in a Slimy Slime Heart in the Slime Press

![An image of the Ink Slime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9af96ad1b297a3a6cd24866a45f6ee321db89ff9.png)

# Runic Slime:
**Diet:** Loves to eat Arcane Debris, but also likes Arcane Essence, Cinder Essence, and any item that's used to select spell elements (Blood Bottle, Poison Potato, Lightning Bottle, that kind of stuff)

**Behavior:**
- Also hates all Iron's Spells' mages and will start attacking them with Eldrich Blast when near them
- Due to its huge magic power, fusion with any other slime can make it unstable, so they can't be turned into a Largo

**Plorts:** Their Plort can turn into any type of runestone, but the blank one is a little bit more common

**How to get:** You can only get their heart by pressing a blank runestone into an Ink Slime Heart in the Slime Press

![An image of the Runic Slime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce9bb9a8def1efa64f034d34c2c6606e15b93547.png)
 
### Dependencies:
To use this addon, you'll need to have [Splendid Slimes](https://modrinth.com/mod/splendid-slimes) and [Iron's Spells and Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) installed (obviously).

### Support:
If you have any suggestions or need any support with the addon, you can leave a comment or contact me directly, message me in [my Discord](https://discord.com/users/lucasflin)! :D
